title: Law Proposes an Alliance

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll get them back no matter what!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You guys take care of the kids!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All right, just hand it over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All right, let's move, frankly!! This way!!

summary: Law Proposes an Alliance. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
